title: ラッキーのおすそわけ

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's heeere!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you offer to be on litter collecting duty today,
great happiness will find you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, I-I'm so happy for you! There really is
hope after all!

text_block_list.name: Querent
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But won't I have to pick up all the trash by
myself? That sounds annoying...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huwhat?! But there's so much luck and happiness
on the table—all you have to do is throw away
trash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why would you pass up on such a joyous
opportunity?! If it were possible, I'd be more than
happy to take your place!

text_block_list.name: Querent
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why not join me? We could all share
the happiness!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-would that even work? What should we do,
Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't see the problem. I'll stake my dignity as a
fortune teller and aid you in your quest for luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... We've picked the academy clean, but I've yet to get a whiff of good fortune...

text_block_list.name: Querent
text_block_list.text:
Wait, seriously?! But I went through with this
because I trusted you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, um, perhaps our efforts will be rewarded
somewhere down the line...
Hm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you the dear pony who often comes to my
rehearsals bringing provisions?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And you're cleaning today? It's wonderful to
know you're working so hard even without an
audience. ♪

text_block_list.name: Querent
text_block_list.text: Hwuh? Fuji... U-um, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru, d-did you see that?! Something lucky
really happened!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! The great Shiraoki has done it yet again!
We offer our thanks for bringing us divine
fortune!
You two, halt!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The hallway's not a place for you to goof around.
Is this another one of your fortune telling stunts?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek! Air Groove?! W-well, umm, I promise you
no oil from snakes or any other animal is being
sold on the premises!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I c-can vouch for her! We're not handing out any
talismans, dolls, or fortune cookies either!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I got news you two took the initiative to clean the
academy. I came to thank you on behalf of the
student council.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Also, I've brought you a gift.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's this slip of paper?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's a coupon for a free honeyade. I haven't the
time to trade it in with all my pre-race
preparations.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You two should use it instead.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wooow... Thank you very much! Fukukitaru, it
looks like luck has come our way too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And there's plenty to go around! Oh, the great
Shiraoki cares for all of her devoted followers!
